meta.title: Alexandra Porhansl — Full-Stack Developer · Vue / Nuxt · Mulhouse
meta.description: Full-stack developer with a strong front-end and design leaning (Vue, Nuxt, TypeScript, Symfony, UI/UX), 7 years of experience. Based in Mulhouse, France — Basel, Freiburg, Strasbourg and Zurich within reach. Freelance or permanent.

hero.eyebrow: Mulhouse · Basel 35 min · Freiburg 50 min · Strasbourg 55 min · Zurich 1 h 50
hero.stack: front in vue and nuxt · back in symfony and nest · 7 years

status.main: Open to a permanent role or a project, in Mulhouse and across the border
status.geo: French, English, German · mobile and happy to relocate

value.title: What I bring
value.intro: I've worked in quite a few different industries over seven years. The code is rarely the hard part. The hard part is working out what people actually want, and then seeing it through.

s1.t: I ask a lot of questions
s1.d: At the start of a project I ask a lot of questions, to the client or to the team depending on where the need comes from. That turns into a spec with clear priorities.

s2.d: I come from the front end and I enjoy the design work. I do my own mockups in Figma, I pay attention to detail, and I'd rather think an interface through than be handed one.

s3.t: I work with AI, but I start with a plan
s3.d: I build with Claude Code every day. It started on my own time. I never run an agent without writing a plan first, and that's what keeps me in control. It also means I pick up languages I don't use often fairly quickly. And I keep the code clean: Prettier, conventions, tests. AI doesn't replace standards.

s4.d: Specs, development, QA, release, and the follow-up after. I debug web and mobile.

bullets.t: moved a CSHTML / jQuery codebase to Vue.js.
major releases built with Ionic and Angular, shipped to Google Play & the App Store.
built and deployed a complete website with Nuxt.js.

spv.context: In-house development — clients and payroll managers

bullets.t: contributed to the PrestaShop 1.6 to 8.2 upgrade.
tracked down complex bugs, improved platform stability and performance.
led the Vue.js / TypeScript front end.
Swift development for a large part of the mission, through to the app's public release.
designed SaaS interfaces for a vehicle fleet management product.
set up Prettier and shared conventions, acceptance tests with Codeception.
worked with Docker and Git-based CI/CD.

vivocaz.context: Startup — Agile, two-week sprints, code review, daily stand-ups

bullets.t: custom solutions built with Symfony 3/4/5 and PHP.
built and maintained a portfolio of WordPress sites.
administered Windows Server and Linux machines.

olihost.context: Web agency — client development, Agile with daily stand-ups

mob.title: Mobility
mob.text: I live in Mulhouse and I drive, so getting around the region is easy. Basel, Freiburg, Zurich and Strasbourg are all within reach. And above all, I'm open to relocating for the right role. On-site, hybrid or remote — whatever works best for you.
mob.mapAria: Travel-time map from Mulhouse: Colmar 30 min, Basel 35 min, Belfort 40 min, Freiburg 50 min, Montbéliard 50 min, Strasbourg 55 min, Zurich 1 h 50

en.name: English
en.note: I understand it well and practise every day, still getting better

cta.line: A role or a project? Drop me a line — I usually reply the same day.

p: This site is hosted by Cloudflare, Inc., 101 Townsend Street, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA — www.cloudflare.com.
All content on this site (texts, visuals, photographs, code) is the property of Alexandra Porhansl unless stated otherwise. Any full or partial reproduction without prior permission is prohibited.
This site collects no personal data: no accounts, no forms, no audience analytics, no advertising trackers.
A single strictly functional cookie is used: “lang”, which remembers the display language. It exists purely for browsing comfort and is never shared with third parties.
Any question about your data: a.porhansl{'@'}icloud.com.
Design & development: Alexandra Porhansl — built with Claude Code.

lofi.real: what I'm listening to right now

meta.title: Alexandra Porhansl — Digitalisation & AI for SMEs · Alsace, tri-border
meta.description: I turn your manual processes into custom tools and bring AI in where it actually saves time. Independent full-stack developer in Mulhouse, for SMEs across Alsace and the tri-border region.

hero.t2: Bring in AI where it counts.
hero.sub: From your day-to-day IT to custom-built tools: I manage it, I build it, and I bring AI in where it saves you time. Direct, without the cost or the delays of an agency.

pain.title: Sound familiar?
items: You're still juggling several Excel files that don't talk to each other.
Your teams re-enter the same data from one tool to the next.
You want a website that actually does something, not just a brochure.
You have no one in-house to handle your day-to-day IT.
You hear about AI everywhere, but don't know where to start.

items.d: Half a day to two days together: I look at your processes, spot where you lose time, and hand you a clear plan with the gains on the table. No commitment to go further.
No in-house IT team? I take care of it: workstations, printers, servers, maintenance. And because I know how you work from the inside, I quickly spot what can be simplified or automated.
A dashboard, an application that replaces your spreadsheets and double data entry. Built around the way you work, not the other way round.

items.t: A website that works for you
items.d: Not just a brochure: bookings, useful forms, a client area, connections to your tools. A site that saves you time.
An assistant that answers from your documents, automatic email sorting, data extraction, content generation. AI where it genuinely helps, not for the hype.
30 minutes to understand your need. Free, no commitment.
A clear plan and a quote. You know exactly what you get and at what price.
I build, I show you regularly, I adjust. You follow the progress.
Production release, onboarding, and follow-up after delivery.

items.t: Faster and cheaper than an agency
items.d: I develop with AI every day. What takes weeks elsewhere takes me less time — and that shows on the quote.

items.t: One person for all your IT
items.d: From the workstation that won't cooperate to the custom tool that saves you hours: a single contact who understands your day-to-day and moves it forward — and who keeps learning to stay current.
You talk directly to the person who builds. No project manager, no layers in between.

items.t: Seven years, from web to business software
items.d: I've built business software, SaaS platforms, mobile apps. I understand the code and the need behind it.

items.t: The proof is in front of you
items.d: This site, I designed and built myself, with AI. Its code is public. What I do for myself, I can do for you.

cta.title: Let's talk about your project
cta.sub: 30 minutes, no commitment. Tell me where you lose time, I'll tell you what's possible.
